scripts.build:source-health-deps: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/types build && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/crypto build && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/data-model build && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/luma-sdk build && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/gun-client build && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 --filter @vh/ai-engine build
scripts.report:source-admission: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceAdmissionReport.js
scripts.report:source-health: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceHealthReport.js
scripts.check:source-health:liveness: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceHealthLivenessReport.js
scripts.report:source-scout: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceCandidateScout.js

scripts.catchup:public-synthesis: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/publicSynthesisCatchup.js
scripts.check:source-health: corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build:source-health-deps && corepack pnpm@9.7.1 build && VH_NEWS_SOURCE_HEALTH_ENFORCE_RELEASE_EVIDENCE=1 node --loader ../../tools/node/esm-resolve-loader.mjs dist/sourceHealthReport.js
